blocking_issues: Full suite command `cd scripts/curation && python3 -m pytest tests/ -v` fails pre-existing source fixture tests (missing manifest files and missing manifest keys under `fixtures/*`), unrelated to QUAL-004 write scope.
Git commit is blocked by pre-commit hooks due pre-existing repo-level failures: missing `biome` command and failing `pnpm type-check:native` with many existing Convex/_generated TypeScript errors.

Unexpected worktree modification appeared outside QUAL-004 write scope: `scripts/curation/.spec/research/curation-hardening/artifacts/inf004-embedding-cost-ledger.md` (not touched by this implementation).
summary: Implemented QUAL-004 with a new coverage report module and pytest suite using TDD. The implementation computes per-state and per-archetype coverage gaps (tiered thresholds), composite-score histogram buckets, anomaly detection (>30%), markdown rendering with ASCII bar chart and GFM tables, and dual output artifacts (dated markdown, latest symlink, JSON sidecar). Targeted QUAL-004 tests pass, and baseline report artifacts were generated in `baseline/`. Completion is blocked by pre-existing repository validation failures outside task scope, which prevent a successful commit.

notebook_entries.action: Explored required context and project patterns
notebook_entries.outcome: Read ROOT-CONTEXT.md, RULES.md, models, existing QUAL tests, and quality module conventions to align implementation.
Created `scripts/curation/tests/test_qual_004.py` covering AC-1 through AC-6 with in-memory `EnrichedRoute` fixtures and no HTTP usage.

Added `scripts/curation/pipeline/quality/coverage_report.py` with report generation, markdown/JSON rendering, histogram charting, anomaly flagging, file writing, symlink creation, and CLI input loading.
`tests/test_qual_004.py` passed (6/6). Full `tests/` run failed due pre-existing fixture manifest issues in source fixture suites outside QUAL-004 scope.
